toolInput:
{"description":"Explore auth and API routes","prompt":"Explore the codebase to understand the current state of authentication protection on API routes. Specifically:

1. Find all route.ts files in src/app/api/ (list them all)
2. Read src/auth/withAuth.ts to understand its interface
3. Read src/auth/auth-service.ts to understand auth patterns
4. Read src/collections/*.ts to understand data models and RBAC roles
5. Look at a few examples of routes that already use withAuth (e.g., notes, enroll, quizzes)
6. Check src/routes/notifications.ts if it exists
7. Check src/app/my-route/route.ts if it exists
8. Read src/utils/rbac.ts or similar role definitions if they exist

Provide a comprehensive summary of:
- All API routes found
- Which ones use withAuth and with what options
- Which ones are missing withAuth
- What the RBAC role system looks like
- What the notifications routes look like
- What the quiz routes look like","subagent_type":"Explore"}
